name: Classical Bullet Hell
short_description: Battle 10 great composer in this classical bullethell. Will you be able to defeat them all?
detailed_description:
Battle 10 of the great classical composers in this epic classical bullet hell. Get stronger as you advance through the fights.

Win against each of them by doging their projectile and attacking with your own. Each victory give you a bonus of your choice in this list:

  • One or two lifes

  • A faster shooting speed

  • Faster bullets

  • Faster movement

With each victory, the action will get more intense as your enemies will have more health and more difficult shooting patterns.

Playing the game is easy, only stir yourself in the 2D plane to dodge your ennemy bullets. While escaping their attacts, get back at them with projectiles of your own.
